std.value: Li Hua is a middle school student. Li Hua got sick last week. On Monday evening, he had a fever and a bad headache. His mother took his temperature, gave him medicine, and told him to drink more water. He stayed in bed on Tuesday and didn't go to school. By Friday, he felt much better and went back to school on Monday. The doctor said he should exercise more and eat healthy food to stay strong. He learned that the most important thing is health.

std.value: Li Hua is a middle school student. Li Hua got sick last week. It started on Monday evening when he had a fever and a bad headache. His mother took his temperature and said he had a fever. She gave him some medicine and told him to drink more water. He stayed in bed all day on Tuesday and didn't go to school. On Wednesday, he still had a cough, but his fever was gone. He rested for two more days. By Friday, he felt much better. He went back to school on Monday. The doctor said he should exercise more and eat healthy food to stay strong. Li Hua learned that health is the most important thing.

info.value: Hi, I'm Li Hua. I'm a middle school student. Last week, I got sick. It started on Monday evening. I had a fever and a bad headache. My temperature was 38.5 degrees. My mum took my temperature and said I had a fever. She gave me some medicine and told me to drink more water. I stayed in bed all day on Tuesday. I didn't go to school. On Wednesday, I still had a cough, but my fever was gone. I rested for two more days. By Friday, I felt much better. I went back to school on Monday. The doctor said I should exercise more and eat healthy food to stay strong. I learned that health is the most important thing.
